arts.ttl: Tottenham Interested in Milan’s Fikayo Tomori
arts.sum: In a late twist to the January transfer window, Tottenham Hotspur have emerged as the frontrunner in the race to sign AC Milan defender Fikayo Tomori. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the North London club has reportedly intensified its efforts to secure the English center-back, outpacing Aston Villa in the process. The post Tottenham Interested in Milan’s Fikayo Tomori appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Tottenham insisting upon defender in late window effort – Aston Villa also in the mix
arts.sum: Tottenham are insisting upon a move for Fikayo Tomori as they plan a busy end to the transfer window. That’s according to journalist Gianluca di Marzio, who reports that Tottenham have joined Aston Villa in showing an interest in the defender. He states that Tottenham ‘insists on’ Tomori and have been ‘insisting’ on a move The post Tottenham insisting upon defender in late window effort – Aston Villa also in the mix appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Fabrizio Romano delivers BOMBSHELL Mathys Tel update
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur chairman Daniel Levy has reportedly travelled to Germany to “accelerate talks” with Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel . The transfer expert posted on X : “Tottenham chairman Daniel Levy has arrived in Munich today in order to accelerate talks for Mathys Tel.
